nasb.text: He who is slow to anger has great understanding, But he who is quick-tempered exalts folly.

esv.text: Whoever is slow to anger has great understanding, but he who has a hasty temper exalts folly.

cnv.text: 不輕易動怒的，十分聰明； 輕易動怒的，大顯愚妄。

ccb.text: 不轻易发怒者深明事理， 鲁莽急躁的人显出愚昧。

csbs.text: 不轻易发怒的，大有聪慧； 性情急躁的，高举愚妄。
